titleStmt.title: SII 36.228: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 228. (A.R. No. 228 of 1910.) CONJEEVERAM, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south base of the Jvaraharēśvara temple.

summary.p: (Dhanu, śu., 1, Monday and Pūrāḍam = A.D. 1270, December 15, Monday.).

The Pallava chief Tipurāsar Nallasittarasaṉ of Ambalūr granted income from the tax on looms (taṟik-kaḍamai) and other taxes as sarvamāṉyam for providing sacred food offerings and for lighting lamps in the temple of Suravaṭṭāramuḍaiya Nāyaṉār in the city of Kāñchipuram in Eyiṟ-kōṭṭam, a subdivision of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vicaiyakaṇṭakopālatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 tāvatu dhanu nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pradhamaiyun tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūrāṭattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu
Eyiṟ koṭṭattu nakaraṅ kāñcipurattu Uṭaiyār curavaṭṭāramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkup pallavavamśattu Ampalūrt tipurācar nallacittaracaṉeṉ Iṉṉāyaṉār tirumaṭaiviḷākattil Uḷḷa
taṟik kaṭamaiyum Ittaṟikku varum Epperpaṭṭa Upātikaḷum Iṉṉāyaṉārkku Amutupaṭi tiruviḷakkut tiruppaṇikku Uṭalākac cantirātittavarai sarvvamāṉyamākac celvatāka viṭṭen nāṉ ce
yta Ittaṉmattukku Aḻivu ceytavarkaḷ keṅkaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭaik kurāṟpacuvaik koṉṟāṉ pāvaṅ koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷ Ippaṭikku Ivai nallacittaracaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 36.228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
